title: agropyron caninum var. hornemannii
intro: Agropyron caninum var. hornemannii, also known as Hornemann's wheat grass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hornemann's wheat grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant material in a solvent, such as ethanol or glycerin.
